thesis: THE REAL J-EDGE: BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON at STRICT >=2-confluence selection (named-level rejection / ribbon-flip-to-bear / multi-day trendline / sequence-rejection) in the morning (09:35-11:00 ET), puts only. Does strict selection convert the low-confluence coin-flip into a real per-trade option edge? Tested honestly; may also fail.
detector: STRICT >=2-of-4 confluence on closed bars, causal one-entry/day, next-bar-open fill (no look-ahead). Components: named_level_rejection (structural per-day levels), ribbon_flip_to_bear (Saty 13/20/48 stack flip), multiday_trendline (descending resistance line projected to bar), sequence_rejection (market_structure fresh bearish CHoCH/BOS or fresh LH)

j_anchor_edge_capture.edge_capture_formula: sum(engine_pnl on J winning days) - sum(max(0, engine loss on J losing days)); winners not fired = missed capture

fraud_gates.reason: no-truncation PASS: chart-stop-only (-0.99)/tr=$-34.50208333333332 holds vs chosen $-16.4395833333333/tr | RANDOM-NULL FAIL: $-16.4395833333333/tr vs null max $4.21 mean $-12.44 (drop-top5 $-32.529670329670296) -> a coin-flip entry reproduces it; the edge is the exit bracket (L172)

DISCLOSURE.is_oos: IS=2025 AND OOS=2026 BOTH required positive (rejects single-regime artifacts)
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: real OPRA fills; SPY-direction != option edge (C3/L58)
DISCLOSURE.fraud_gates: random-entry-null (L172) AND no-truncation (L171) -- the two discriminators that caught RSI2/IBS/ema_adx after the naive 5-gate bar
DISCLOSURE.named_levels_caveat: live key-levels.json is today-only; for the 16mo backtest named levels are derived STRUCTURALLY per-day (prior-day high/close, overnight/premarket high) -- a documented substitute, NOT J's curated star levels
DISCLOSURE.j_anchor: OP-16 edge-capture is DISCLOSED not gated -- the strict morning detector need not fire on every anchor day; a non-firing winner = missed capture, a fired-and-worse loser = regression (anchor.no_loser_regression)
DISCLOSURE.j_anchor_finding: DIAGNOSED: edge_capture=$0 because the strict >=2 gate NEVER reaches 2 components on ANY of J's 3 anchor winner days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) -- each fires only ONE structural component at MIN_CONFLUENCE=1 (4/29 named_level, 5/01 sequence, 5/04 named_level). J's actual reads (his curated star levels + hand-drawn multi-day trendlines) carry information the structural substitutes do not reproduce, so strict structural confluence does not co-locate with J's real winners. The 114 signals it DID stack to 2+ are a different, losing population (28% WR, -$12.68/tr) -- i.e. strict confluence selected MORE trades, not BETTER ones (C24: anchor trades are one-off exceptional setups; the general same-class population are losers).
DISCLOSURE.no_cherry_pick: single fixed structure (ITM-2/-8%/v15), MIN_CONFLUENCE=2; no grid pick (2.10)
